query:
-- Delete the unnecessary duplicate customer records we just created
-- (the billing items already had customer matches)
DELETE FROM customers WHERE externalId IN ('C9034', 'C9035', 'C9036', 'C9039', 'C9040', 'C9041');
-- Keep C9037 (TYS Molendinar) and C9038 (Zambrero Coomera Square) as they were new

-- Check what services exist for these customers
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM services s
WHERE s.customerExternalId IN ('C0176', 'C9037', 'C0125', 'C0295', 'C9038', 'C2791', 'C1405', 'C0155')
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId;
